name: mozi
description: Codex plugin for an end-to-end NPU operator development harness, including normalized operator PRD generation, review, and review-driven revision.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and review operator PRDs for NPU harness work.
interface.longDescription: Mozi is a Codex plugin for an end-to-end NPU operator development harness. The current workflows provide $mozi:create-prd to generate a normalized operator PRD from a brief user prompt or revise an existing PRD from review feedback, and $mozi:review-prd to score a PRD for SPEC readiness.
defaultPrompt: Use $mozi:create-prd to generate a PRD for AddRelu.
Use $mozi:create-prd with a PRD path and review feedback to revise the PRD in place.
Use $mozi:review-prd with an absolute PRD path to score whether the PRD is ready for SPEC.
Create a normalized operator PRD from a brief prompt.
Update an operator PRD from review comments.
Prepare a structured PRD document for a new NPU operator.
Review an operator PRD and return a YAML SPEC readiness decision.
